column2: Determine if Ticket is Related to RP Topic
column3: Replacement parts are on order and SU is reaching out in query to these. We’d like to gauge how many RP tickets are coming through AOPS/POS, as not all tickets are clearly labeled with "-R-" when raised. If the ticket IS related to RP: Navigate to components section of ServiceHub Click on the Pencil icon Insert "RP" Select "RP" when it appears. Click on the ✓ symbol. (Visual 2.1)
The task of adding the tracking component has been completed. Next, support the supplier with their query, using additional SOPs to fully resolve the ticket.
